notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you were looking for does not exist.

landing.signInPrompt: Sign in to manage your workspaces.
landing.noWorkspacesDescription: Create your first workspace to get started.

workspace.notAvailableDescription: This workspace does not exist, or you are not a member of it.
workspace.openErrorDescription: Something went wrong opening this workspace. Please try again.
workspace.loadErrorDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again.

overview.subtitle: Everything for this workspace, in one place.

importExport.label: Import / Export
importExport.description: Bring subscribers in and out via CSV.

suspension.message: This workspace is suspended for non-payment. Sending is disabled until the outstanding balance is settled.

usageMeter.exhausted: Plan allowance reached for this period.
usageMeter.nearLimit: Approaching the plan allowance for this period.

publicUrlList.empty: No public URLs to share yet.
publicUrlList.tokenHint: The {token} placeholder is filled in automatically when this link is sent to a subscriber.

mediaPicker.title: Insert from media library
mediaPicker.description: Pick an asset to insert into the message. Only your tenant's media is shown.
mediaPicker.emptyMessage: Upload files in the Media library before inserting them here.

jsonAttributeEditor.label: Custom attributes
jsonAttributeEditor.mustBeObject: Attributes must be a JSON object, e.g. { "plan": "pro" }.
jsonAttributeEditor.hint: A JSON object of custom fields stored with this subscriber.

cssEditor.label: Custom CSS
cssEditor.hint: CSS is sanitized server-side before it is applied to your public pages. Limit: {{limit}} bytes.
cssEditor.overLimit: Reduce the CSS below the limit before saving.
cssEditor.sanitizedHeading: Sanitized CSS applied to your public pages

clipboard.copyFailed: Could not copy — copy the URL manually.
clipboard.copyToClipboardFailed: Could not copy to the clipboard.
